##NAMES=Philipsbornite
##RRUFFID=R070065

##LOCALITY=Hat Yai Province, Thailand
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless pyramidal crystals, associated with yellow mimetite. The sample could be a solid solution among segnitite-philipsbornite-beudantite-hidalgoite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070065

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=785
